chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 2345 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2018. FOR NON PROSECUTION. Mr. Mazhar Hussain Kalwar, Advocate for the petitioner. ------- Today the case is fixed for orders as to non-prosecution of the main petition as duplicate set has not been supplied. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that parties have reached to amicable compromise outside the court, therefore, he does not press this petition. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of as withdrawn alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
